title: Lead Instructional Designer at Pune University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Pune University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pune University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Pune University:
Pune University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pune University!
